data.title: SrcRoot - Full-Stack Digital Agency
data.subtitle: Engineering Premium Digital Experiences
data.about: SrcRoot is a specialized digital agency focused on building high-performance, high-aesthetic web and mobile applications. We bridge the gap between creative design and robust engineering to deliver premium digital products.
data.goal: To provide world-class engineering services that help businesses scale their digital infrastructure with sub-second performance and modern aesthetics.
data.execution: Leveraged the @srcroot/ui design system to maintain consistency across all client projects. Implemented automated CI/CD pipelines and cloud-native architectures to ensure high availability.
data.results: Delivered over 20+ successful projects for global clients, establishing a reputation for engineering excellence and visual fluidity.

data.title: @srcroot/ui - Design System
data.subtitle: Polymorphic, Accessible React Component Library
data.about: @srcroot/ui is a high-performance design system providing polymorphic and accessible React components. It follows a copy-and-paste philosophy (similar to shadcn/ui) but with a focus on deep polymorphism and highly customizable variants using class-variance-authority.
data.goal: To provide developers with a robust, accessible foundation for building complex UIs without the overhead of heavy runtime libraries.
data.execution: Built with TypeScript for full type safety. Implemented a CLI for component distribution and initialized a comprehensive playground for real-time component testing.
data.results: Published on NPM as a core library for all SrcRoot and ExpressITLab projects, ensuring design consistency across the entire ecosystem.

data.title: SrcRoot PM - Collaborative Kanban
data.subtitle: High-Performance Project Management Dashboard
data.about: SrcRoot PM is a modern project management platform featuring a high-fidelity Kanban board, real-time data visualization, and an integrated knowledge base. It serves as the reference implementation for the @srcroot/ui design system.
data.goal: To create a seamless, high-aesthetic workspace that unifies task tracking, team velocity analytics, and project documentation.
data.execution: Built with the Next.js 15 App Router and leveraging @dnd-kit for fluid drag-and-drop interactions. Implemented complex data charting using Recharts and standardized the entire UI using the @srcroot/ui component library.
data.results: Delivered a production-ready dashboard with responsive layouts, multi-theme support (Dark/Light), and optimized performance for handling large task volumes.

data.title: CalQuick - Enterprise SaaS Ecosystem
data.subtitle: Multi-tenant inventory, POS, and e-commerce infrastructure.
data.about: CalQuick is a comprehensive commerce ecosystem designed to bridge the gap between offline retail and online e-commerce. It provides a multi-tenant platform where business owners can manage inventory across multiple warehouses, process orders via a high-performance POS, and sync everything with a customizable storefront.
data.goal: To build a 'single source of truth' for retail businesses in Bangladesh, integrating 14+ local courier partners and smart fraud detection to minimize return rates and maximize operational efficiency.
data.execution: Implemented a modular micro-service architecture including a dedicated fraud checker, a theme deployment engine, and a secure storage layer. Leveraged NestJS for the backend and Next.js for the multi-role dashboard (Admin, Merchant, Employee).
data.results: Successfully integrated 14+ courier APIs (Pathao, Steadfast, etc.) and achieved sub-second order processing times. The platform currently supports multi-tenant isolation with full GDPR-compliant data segregation.

data.title: ClipX
data.subtitle: Linux Clipboard Manager
data.about: A fast, native, and stealthy clipboard manager for Linux, optimized for GNOME Wayland. It features a glassmorphic HUD built with a Tokyo Night aesthetic and a lightweight background daemon for persistent history.
data.goal: To create a clipboard manager that feels like a native part of the OS, providing instant auto-pasting and fuzzy search without the clutter of traditional GUI apps.
data.execution: Developed using Rust for the background daemon (`daemon.rs`) and GTK3 for the HUD (`ui.rs`). Implemented hardware-level input simulation via `ydotool` for Wayland compatibility.
data.results: Delivered a production-ready `.deb` package with automated systemd service integration and global shortcut bindings.

data.title: PixlyOne - Server-Side Tracking
data.subtitle: Privacy-First, Ad-Block Resistant Analytics Solution
data.about: PixlyOne is an enterprise-grade server-side tracking platform that helps marketers bypass ad blockers and maintain privacy compliance. It manages Server-side Google Tag Manager (sGTM) containers with sub-second dashboard performance.
data.goal: To ensure 99.9% data collection accuracy while maintaining full GDPR/CCPA compliance.
data.execution: Developed with a React/TypeScript frontend and a robust backend designed for handling 50,000+ daily impressions per container.
data.results: Achieved 99.9% tracking reliability and reduced average page load times by 35% through server-side offloading.

data.title: Fudee - Modern Restaurant Ecosystem
data.subtitle: Comprehensive dining platform with live order tracking.
data.about: Fudee is a multi-module restaurant platform designed for seamless dining experiences. It features a public-facing menu and reservation system, a customer portal for order tracking, and a powerful admin dashboard for live order management and analytics.
data.goal: To architect a high-aesthetic, performant platform using GSAP for entrance sequences and Framer Motion for micro-interactions.
data.execution: Implemented Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) to isolate Public, Portal, and Admin modules. Leveraged GSAP for staggering hero section animations and Sonner for global notification handling.
data.results: Delivered a fluid, responsive interface with sub-second page transitions and a centralized management system for restaurant operators.

data.title: SrcRoot IoT Attendance
data.subtitle: Biometric & RFID Edge Computing Firmware
data.about: A sophisticated IoT attendance system built on the ESP32 platform. It integrates biometric fingerprint scanning, RFID card reading, and environment sensors (DHT11) to provide a complete edge-computing solution for workplace management.
data.goal: To build a secure, async-capable firmware that handles real-time sensor data and provides a captive portal for device configuration.
data.execution: Developed using the Arduino framework with specialized handlers for SPIFFS storage, async web servers, and multi-sensor polling. Implemented SHA-256 password hashing for local setup security.
data.results: Successfully deployed a low-latency attendance device with integrated OLED status display and remote NTP time synchronization.

data.title: Healthcare Management System
data.subtitle: Patient-Centric Portal & Doctor Management
data.about: A comprehensive healthcare platform providing modules for appointment booking, emergency services, and department management. It includes a dedicated portal for patient history and doctor availability tracking.
data.goal: To streamline medical workflows and improve patient accessibility to healthcare services through a modern web interface.
data.execution: Built with Next.js App Router, featuring optimized routes for different hospital departments and a robust scheduling engine.
data.results: Reduced administrative overhead for appointment management and provided patients with a seamless booking experience.

data.title: WaveMode
data.subtitle: Premium Music Discovery Platform
data.about: WaveMode is a high-end music discovery platform that prioritizes visual fluidity and high-fidelity audio interaction. It features glassmorphic components and complex animation sequences.
data.goal: To push the boundaries of web-based audio interfaces using modern animation libraries and accessibility primitives.
data.execution: Built with Radix UI for accessible components and GSAP for intricate layout transitions. Integrated Recharts for audio visualization components.
data.results: A highly interactive music dashboard that provides an immersive user experience beyond traditional streaming apps.

data.title: Professional Teleprompter Utility
data.subtitle: High-Contrast, Browser-Based Teleprompter
data.about: A specialized tool for content creators that provides a high-contrast, customizable teleprompter interface directly in the browser. Supports mirror mode and adjustable scroll speeds.
data.goal: To create a lightweight, zero-latency tool for video production.
data.execution: Focused on GPU-accelerated scrolling and high-contrast typography to ensure readability across different lighting conditions.
data.results: A reliable utility used for the automated Manhwa recap pipeline to ensure smooth narration delivery.

data.title: GTM Dual-Service Cluster
data.subtitle: Cloud-Native Tagging Infrastructure
data.about: A high-availability cluster setup for Google Tag Manager (GTM) Server-Side tagging. It features dual tagging/preview server instances with automated health checks and optimized Nginx routing for multiple domains.
data.goal: To provide a scalable, ad-block resistant analytics infrastructure for enterprise-scale data collection.
data.execution: Developed a custom orchestration script (`run.sh`) and Docker Compose configuration to manage multiple GTM environments. Optimized Nginx headers for maximum privacy and cross-domain data persistence.
data.results: Achieved 99.9% uptime for tagging services and enabled seamless preview/debug workflows for analytics teams.

data.title: System Maintenance Proxy
data.subtitle: High-Availability 503 Status Orchestrator
data.about: A specialized Node.js utility designed to serve as a high-availability maintenance gateway. It intercepts incoming traffic during scheduled downtimes or emergency maintenance, providing clean, localized status pages while maintaining proper SEO response codes (503 Service Unavailable).
data.goal: To provide a zero-config, lightweight failover solution that ensures a professional user experience during system updates.
data.execution: Developed using Express.js with a global middleware handler. Containerized with Docker for rapid deployment across any micro-project in the ecosystem via centralized Nginx proxying.
data.results: Streamlined the update cycle for multiple production platforms, allowing for 'Hot' maintenance swaps with minimal configuration overhead.

data.title: OroSysBD - Enterprise Jewelry Shop Management
data.subtitle: Comprehensive Business Operations Platform
data.about: A multi-service enterprise platform designed for corporate management. It includes modules for service tracking, backend administration, and a public-facing portal for client interactions.
data.goal: To centralize fragmented business operations into a single, cohesive digital ecosystem.
data.execution: Developed using a microservice-oriented architecture with dedicated domains for frontend, backend, and specialized services.
data.results: Streamlined internal workflows and provided a unified management dashboard for business stakeholders.

data.title: VetCare - Veterinary Clinic
data.subtitle: Specialized Healthcare for Animal Clinics
data.about: A vertical SaaS platform tailored for veterinary clinics. It manages patient records, appointment scheduling, and treatment history for animal patients.
data.goal: To provide veterinarians with a specialized tool that addresses the unique needs of animal healthcare management.
data.execution: Built with Next.js and Prisma, focusing on a highly intuitive UI for fast data entry during clinical procedures.
data.results: Successfully automated record-keeping for multiple clinics, reducing paperwork and improving patient care tracking.

data.title: ZyloSync - Enterprise Commerce Engine
data.subtitle: Multi-tenant SaaS backend powering POS and E-commerce ecosystems.
data.about: ZyloSync is a robust, scalable multi-tenant engine designed to power modern retail and e-commerce applications. It provides a comprehensive set of APIs for managing inventory, product catalogs, and high-speed data synchronization between online storefronts and offline POS systems.
data.goal: To create a high-performance, single-source-of-truth engine for distributed commerce operations.
data.execution: Developed with a modular NestJS architecture and a 'schema-first' approach using Prisma. Integrated Redis for sub-millisecond data coordination across distributed nodes.
data.results: Successfully deployed as the core infrastructure for multiple enterprise commerce platforms, handling complex multi-location stock movements.

data.title: ZyloSync Base Theme
data.subtitle: Modular Next.js 16 Storefront Foundation
data.about: The authoritative base theme for the ZyloSync commerce ecosystem. It provides a modular, highly extensible foundation for building premium e-commerce storefronts with a focus on fluid motion, sub-second performance, and modern aesthetics.
data.goal: To establish a 'gold standard' for storefront performance and interactivity, utilizing the latest web technologies.
data.execution: Built with the Next.js 16 canary/bleeding-edge versions and Tailwind CSS 4. Integrated GSAP and Lenis for smooth inertial scrolling and complex UI entrance sequences. Designed with a modular component architecture for easy merchant customization.
data.results: Achieved 100/100 Lighthouse scores while maintaining rich animations and complex dynamic layouts.

data.title: Hisabi - Smart POS
data.subtitle: Modular MERN-Stack Point of Sale System
data.about: Hisabi is a high-performance POS system designed for small to medium enterprises. It features a sophisticated inventory tracking system, multi-role authentication, and real-time sales analytics using Chart.js/ApexCharts.
data.goal: To provide a lightweight yet powerful alternative to bloated enterprise POS solutions with focus on speed and data integrity.
data.execution: Built with a clean MERN architecture, utilizing MongoDB transactions for financial accuracy and a responsive React frontend for high-speed operation on tablets and desktops.
data.results: Delivered a production-ready system with comprehensive reporting modules (Sales, Purchase, Stock) and seamless integration with SMS/WhatsApp APIs for customer notifications.

data.title: attireIdyll - Lifestyle Commerce
data.subtitle: Premium Next.js E-commerce Experience
data.about: A modern, high-conversion e-commerce platform built for the fashion industry. It features dynamic product listings, persistent shopping carts, and a smooth checkout flow integrated with bKash and SSLCommerz.
data.goal: To build a mobile-first, high-performance storefront that maximizes user retention through fluid animations and sub-second page loads.
data.execution: Leveraged Next.js 15 App Router with Turbopack for lightning-fast development. Implemented complex state persistence with Redux Toolkit and smooth UI transitions using Framer Motion.
data.results: Achieved a premium shopping experience with integrated flash deals, campaign modules, and automated delivery tracking.

data.title: eMegaDeal - Premium E-commerce
data.subtitle: High-Conversion Lifestyle Store
data.about: eMegaDeal is a sophisticated e-commerce platform designed for high-conversion lifestyle retail. It features a highly optimized search engine, dynamic product categorization, and a fluid user experience tailored for modern digital shopping.
data.goal: To build a robust, scalable e-commerce storefront that handles high traffic volumes and complex product catalogs with sub-second response times.
data.execution: Leveraged Next.js 15 for server-side rendering and static site generation of product pages. Implemented complex filtering logic and a performance-optimized database schema using Prisma.
data.results: Delivered a feature-rich storefront with integrated payment gateways, automated stock management, and a premium mobile-first interface.

data.title: Bash Runner - DevOps Orchestrator
data.subtitle: Hybrid WebSocket & REST CLI Execution Engine
data.about: A specialized orchestration engine designed to securely execute remote shell commands and deployment scripts. It features a hybrid WebSocket/REST interface for real-time command feedback and a web-based terminal UI.
data.goal: To automate complex multi-stage deployments while maintaining strict security auditing and real-time observability.
data.execution: Built a secure Node.js middleware that bridges web interfaces with system-level execution. Implemented robust API-key authentication and Docker container management modules.
data.results: Streamlined the deployment pipeline for 20+ micro-projects, providing a centralized control plane for infrastructure management.

data.title: ExpressIT Font CDN
data.subtitle: High-Performance Custom Font Delivery System
data.about: A specialized Content Delivery Network designed for serving custom and premium typography. It features a dynamic API that generates optimized @font-face CSS on the fly, reducing font loading latency for client applications.
data.goal: To centralize and optimize font assets across multiple web properties while maintaining low TTFB and high cache hit rates.
data.execution: Developed a custom font indexing script and a lightweight JavaScript API for dynamic CSS delivery. Leveraged GitHub Pages for high-availability hosting and Woff2 compression for minimum payload sizes.
data.results: Successfully streamlined typography management for over 10+ active web projects, providing a consistent and fast font-loading experience.

data.title: SrcRoot SIP Gateway
data.subtitle: High-Availability VoIP & Media Orchestration
data.about: A carrier-grade SIP gateway designed for handling large-scale VoIP traffic. It integrates Drachtio for SIP signaling and RTPEngine for media proxying, providing a robust bridge between disparate telecom networks.
data.goal: To build a programmable, scalable voice infrastructure that can handle thousands of concurrent calls with sub-millisecond signaling latency.
data.execution: Developed a custom NestJS gateway using the Drachtio framework. Implemented advanced media handling via RTPEngine, including transcoding and secure RTP (SRTP) termination.
data.results: Successfully deployed as a core component for a distributed PBX system, supporting high-fidelity voice calls and complex call routing logic.

data.title: SrcRoot Commute
data.subtitle: Intelligent Transport & Routing Platform
data.about: A modern commute management platform that streamlines daily transport logistics. It features real-time vehicle tracking, optimized route planning, and an integrated communication bridge.
data.goal: To reduce urban commute friction through data-driven route optimization and real-time observability.
data.execution: Built with Next.js for the frontend and a WebSocket-driven backend for real-time location updates. Integrated Google Maps SDK for advanced geofencing and distance matrix calculations.
data.results: Delivered a high-performance platform capable of managing multiple fleet operators with centralized dashboarding.

data.title: PDF Engine Service
data.subtitle: High-Throughput HTML-to-PDF Microservice
data.about: A dedicated microservice for generating complex PDF documents from dynamic HTML templates. It uses headless browser rendering for maximum visual fidelity and a robust queue system for handling high-volume bursts.
data.goal: To offload resource-intensive document generation from core application servers.
data.execution: Implemented using Puppeteer for rendering and BullMQ/Redis for job management. Designed with a clean API interface for easy integration with any upstream service.
data.results: Achieved sub-second document generation for standard invoices and reports, with full support for custom CSS and high-resolution imagery.
